title: Command Cockpit Overview Module Compression
summary: Compressed the default Overview mission module inside the Command Cockpit mounted stage so the first selected-lane module reads like a compact mission board.
proof: Added tested Command Cockpit CSS that tightens the Overview dock grid, module meter, stage buttons, and Overview detail-section spacing.
Kept the compression scoped to the Command Cockpit so richer Overview layouts outside that stage retain their existing spacing.
Updated README, index marker, snapshot generation, regression floors, and trace metadata so the standalone atlas records the Overview module compression unlock.
